{{Infobox event
|name=Alice is left alone, feeling lonely and wishing to see her pet cat again
|participants=Alice, Cheshire Cat
|chapitre=3
}}

== Course of events ==

In the aftermath of the Dodo's prize ceremony, where all participants have been declared winners and rewards distributed—Alice giving out candies from her pocket in exchange for receiving a thimble—Alice becomes isolated from the group. Alone in this separation, she experiences an acute sense of loneliness and finds her thoughts turning to her pet cat, whose absence she acutely feels and whose presence she deeply wishes to regain.

This period of solitude and yearning is marked by the presence of the Cheshire Cat among the assembled creatures. The intensity of Alice's longing for her absent pet becomes evident when she subsequently mentions her cat to those around her, a revelation that proves alarming enough to frighten away most of the animals in the vicinity.

== References ==

- Alice's Adventures in Wonderland

[[Category:Événements]]
